title: World Heritage Sites Hit in Airstrikes on Iran
summary_full: Revered cultural icons that have withstood the upheavals of history are being hit hard in the war being waged by Israel and the United States.
summary_public: Revered cultural icons that have withstood the upheavals of history are being hit hard in the war being waged by Israel and the United States.
